assessments.rationale: Elevator guide rails are T-section profiles with constant cross-section along their full length (typically 5-6 m bars). Perfect geometric match for cold-drawing.

~96% of elevator guide rails are steel (solid T-section ~78%, hollow steel ~18%). Aluminium/stainless represent only ~4% niche (residential/light-duty). Steel-only constraint does not restrict the primary market.

assessments.threshold: 6m maximum bar length from cold-drawing line
assessments.rationale: Standard elevator guide rail lengths are 5m (Europe) and 5.3m (ISO 7465). ZOLLERN 6m max exceeds the standard requirement. Hot-rolled competitors offer 12m bars with fewer splice joints, but 5m/6m is industry standard.

Elevator guide rails operate inside enclosed hoistways - dry, indoor environment. No corrosion protection required for standard applications. Specialty applications (marine, outdoor hydraulic lifts) may require treatment, but these are niche.
Elevator guide rail T-section sizes are standardized per ISO 7465 / EN 81-1. ZOLLERN die library already covers the primary EN 50 sizes. New sizes required only for non-standard applications.
